content: I’ll reconstruct the grant submission from this instance only, without earlier conversation history.
I checked the repo context, recent git history, remote URL, and the installed apply-grant skill so the submission matches the grant workflow.
I prepared a clean grant response for Auracrab: Solana-native agentic OS, OpenClaw-but-Solana positioning, day-one support for agents, agentic wallets, x402, onchain skills, and Solana MCP workflows.
